title: Baker Ross FX472 Bunny Self-Inking Stampers - Pack of 10, Easter Stamper for Kids Arts and Crafts
features: Self-inking Craft Stampers: Create instant bunny designs without any mess or additional inks. Simply press Baker Ross self-inking stampers onto paper or card to create perfect colourful impressions

Stampers for Kids: Boys and girls will enjoy creating bunny designs with these easy-to-use craft accessories. Kids can use stampers to create patterns and embellish cards, scrapbooks, decorations and more

Paper and Card Crafts: These reusable stampers have a clip-on lid, so ink won't dry out. This multipack of bunny stampers is perfect for teachers, kids crafts projects, and can be used as a fun party bag filler

Included in the Pack: This pack contains 10 stampers, in 5 assorted Easter designs – bunny, egg, flower and more. Assorted ink colours – purple, orange, blue, green and pink. Impression size approx. 20mm

Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: From the manufacturer Easter Sticker Activity Books Engage young minds with these Easter Sticker Activity Books! This pack of eight books offers an assortment of Easter-themed stickers and activities, providing hours of creative and entertaining fun. Perfect for keeping little ones entertained during Easter celebrations or as delightful gifts. Bunny & Carrot Pull Back Racers Race into Easter excitement with Bunny & Carrot Pull Back Racers! These adorable racers offer hours of entertainment for kids. Pull them back and watch them hop forward, adding a playful touch to Easter gatherings or as delightful Easter basket fillers. Bunny Rubber Ducks Make bath time or playtime extra quacky with these Bunny Rubber Ducks! This pack of rubber ducks, dressed as bunnies, brings Easter joy to bathtubs or play areas. Ideal for Easter-themed parties, egg hunts, or as cute collectibles for duck enthusiasts. Easter Bunny Eggs Get creative with these Easter Bunny Eggs! This pack of twelve eggs offers a fun craft activity for kids. Decorate and personalize these eggs with vibrant colours and designs, perfect for Easter egg hunts or as charming Easter decorations.
